/usr/bin/cc CMakeFiles/integrated_demo.dir/integrated_learning_demo.c.o -o integrated_demo  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/nimcp/build/lib: ../lib/libnimcp.so.2.6.2 -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -llz4 -ljansson -lcjson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart.so -lsodium /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
